content:
The detection pipeline has successfully completed and the results have been written to `/root/detection_results.csv`. Here is the content of the CSV file:

```csv
approximant,snr,total_mass
SEOBNRv4_opt,17.88,44
IMRPhenomD,18.07,44
TaylorT4,17.27,44
```

The analysis detected a potential gravitational wave signal from a binary black hole merger. The strongest signal was found using the IMRPhenomD approximant with a signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) of 18.07 and a total mass of 44 solar masses. The other approximants also detected the signal with slightly lower SNRs but consistent total mass estimates.

Would you like me to perform any additional analysis or visualization of these results?
